title: Lightly Grilled Chinese Tomato Stir-Fry
description: A light and flavorful dish featuring grilled tomatoes with a touch of bitterness to complement the overall taste profile suitable for date nights or casual dinners.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Cut tomatoes into wedges.
Brush tomato wedges with olive oil and season lightly with salt.
Grill the tomatoes until tender, flipping occasionally, about 5 minutes per side.
While tomatoes are grilling, in a small bowl, mix soy sauce, vinegar, and chili garlic paste (if using).
Once tomatoes are done, remove from grill and drizzle over the mixed sauce.
Squeeze fresh lemon juice on top of the grilled tomatoes for added brightness.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and garnish with green onions before serving.
